nasb.text: But the high priest rose up, along with all his associates (that is the sect of the Sadducees), and they were filled with jealousy.

esv.text: But the high priest rose up, and all who were with him (that is, the party of the Sadducees), and filled with jealousy

cnv.text: 大祭司和他的同黨撒都該人都起來，滿心忌恨，

ccb.text: 大祭司和他的同党撒都该人看见这情形，妒火中烧，

csbs.text: 于是大祭司就采取行动。他和所有与他在一起的人，就是撒都该教派的人，都满腔嫉妒，
